title: UNBODYCAMmc
description: UNBODYCAMmc is a modpack that is meant to recreate some aspects of the games UNRECORD and [BODYCAM]. It has bodycam shaders, and gun mods to help you enjoy the experience.
body: UNBODYCAMmc is a minecraft modpack that is meant to replicate aspects of the games UNRECORD and [BODYCAM] with texture packs, shaders, and mods that add new features to help with the experience! It will kinda feel like your playing the real game!
